expectations.evidence: The script uses AgUi.start_run instead of AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::RunStartedEvent.

expectations.text: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::TextMessageStartEvent, TextMessageContentEvent, and TextMessageEndEvent with matching message_id
expectations.evidence: The script uses run.stream_text instead of the start/content/end message events sequence.

expectations.text: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::RunFinishedEvent at the end
expectations.evidence: The script calls run.finish instead of emitting AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::RunFinishedEvent.

expectations.text: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events and writes them to a stream
expectations.evidence: No encoder or serialization library is used; it relies on direct client method calls.
